questions.question: Define what a pointer is in C programming and explain its importance. Describe pointer declaration, initialization, and dereferencing with suitable examples.
keyPoints: Definition of pointer as a variable storing memory address
Importance of pointers in C programming
Example code demonstrating all three operations

questions.question: List the differences between malloc() and calloc() functions in C. Provide examples to illustrate their usage.
keyPoints: malloc: single block allocation, no initialization

questions.question: Explain the concept of pointer arithmetic in C. How does pointer arithmetic differ from regular arithmetic? Illustrate with examples.
keyPoints: Pointer subtraction yielding number of elements
Relationship between pointer arithmetic and array indexing

questions.question: Describe the concept of memory leaks and dangling pointers in C. Provide examples and explain how to prevent them.
keyPoints: Memory leak: definition, example of losing reference to allocated memory
Dangling pointer: definition, example of using pointer after free

questions.question: Write a C program to dynamically allocate memory for an array of n integers, read values, compute their sum and average, and then free the memory.
keyPoints: Using malloc or calloc to allocate array
Input loop to read array elements
Proper use of free() to release memory
